general.name: Rogue Amoeba ACE Kernel Extension
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C7AB963D-14D5-4B6B-86D7-D3B10DDABF5D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C7AB963D-14D5-4B6B-86D7-D3B10DDABF5D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Rogue Amoeba ACE Kernel Extension</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4D51278C-8059-449A-BBA1-BF90672DCE54</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.syspolicy.kernel-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4D51278C-8059-449A-BBA1-BF90672DCE54</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Approved Kernel Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowNonAdminUserApprovals</key><true/><key>AllowedTeamIdentifiers</key><array><string>7266XEXAPM</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
